value.found_quote: You can return to a prior conversation to continue an implementation or refine an existing solution.
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated "Resuming sessions" section that directly and verbatim matches the claim's description. It explicitly states users can return to a prior conversation to continue an implementation or refine an existing solution, and provides detailed instructions for doing so via a TUI session picker, command-line flags, and importing from Antigravity 2.0. The feature appears to be generally available (no preview/beta language).
